identity.description: Music + text agent harness with chat, reflexion, eval, and MIDI rendering.

inputs.description: Routed call to a jazz-guru skill. Set `skill` to one of chat | distill | evalrun | render_midi and provide the per-skill fields.

message.title: Message (chat)
message.description: User message for the chat skill.

session_id.title: Session ID
session_id.description: Existing jazz-guru session UUID. Optional for chat/render_midi (auto-created if absent), required for distill.

title.title: Session title (chat)
title.description: Optional title when chat auto-creates a session.

only.title: Eval task filter (evalrun)
only.description: Run a single eval task by id; omit to run the full regression suite.

midi_path.title: MIDI path (render_midi)
midi_path.description: MIDI file path relative to the session workspace.

out_path.title: Output path (render_midi)
out_path.description: Output audio path (.wav / .flac / .mp3) relative to the session workspace.

post_process.title: Post-processing chain (render_midi)
post_process.description: ffmpeg filter overrides; merged on top of preset defaults.

outputs.description: Skill-specific JSON envelope. Always includes `skill`; chat adds `session_id` + `text` + `usage`; distill adds `score` + `critique`; evalrun adds `result`; render_midi adds `result.path`.

skills.name: Chat
skills.description: Send one turn through AgentLoop; auto-creates a session if none is supplied.
examples: {"skill":"chat","message":"Render workspace/in.mid to out.wav with the jazz_organ preset."}

skills.name: Distill (reflexion)
skills.description: Run the offline reflexion loop on an existing session.

skills.name: Eval run
skills.description: Run the regression suite (or a single task via `only`).

skills.name: Render MIDI
skills.description: Render a MIDI file to audio using a preset or explicit engine + library.
